mapper.sql: SELECT r.room_id AS room_id, r.room_name AS room_name, r.created_by AS created_by, a.agent_name AS created_by_name, r.created_at AS created_at, r.archived_at AS archived_at FROM t_ai_room r LEFT JOIN t_ai_agent a ON a.agent_id = r.created_by
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_ai_room (room_id, room_name, created_by) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: JOIN t_ai_room_member m ON m.room_id = r.room_id WHERE m.agent_id = #{agentId} AND r.archived_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT m.agent_id AS agent_id, a.agent_name AS agent_name, m.role AS role, m.joined_at AS joined_at FROM t_ai_room_member m LEFT JOIN t_ai_agent a ON a.agent_id = m.agent_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.joined_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_ai_room_message (message_id, room_id, from_agent_id, content) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{roomId}, #{fromAgentId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT m.message_id AS message_id, m.room_id AS room_id, m.from_agent_id AS from_agent_id, a.agent_name AS from_agent_name, m.content AS content, m.created_at AS created_at FROM t_ai_room_message m LEFT JOIN t_ai_agent a ON a.agent_id = m.from_agent_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
